description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 25, 2024 at 8:40 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Broadway near Buchanan Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was parked at the curb in the westbound direction of Broadway street, in front of a parked passenger car, when another 
passenger car parallel parked in front of the Waymo AV within close proximity to the front of the Waymo AV. Due to the proximity of the 
now parked passenger car in front of the Waymo AV, the Waymo AV was unable to unpark from the curb, and the ADS was disengaged to 
maneuver the Waymo AV away from the curb.  
The Waymo AV was maneuvered in manual mode to unpark from the curb. During this maneuver, the test driver reversed the Waymo AV 
and the rear of the Waymo AV made contact with the front of the passenger car that was parked behind the Waymo AV. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in conventional mode. Both 
vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
